name: HitPay
description: Singapore-based all-in-one payment gateway for SEA SMBs — cards, PayNow, wallets, POS, invoicing.

seo.title: HitPay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: HitPay: Singapore-based all-in-one payment gateway for SEA SMBs — cards, PayNow, wallets, POS, invoicing.

when_to_use: PayNow, card, and digital wallet payments for Singapore SMBs
All-in-one payment gateway with POS and invoicing for SEA small businesses
Online and in-person payment acceptance via single HitPay account
Payment links and QR codes for service-based businesses in Singapore

pros: Covers SEA local rails like PayNow and GrabPay
cons: Limited reach outside Singapore and SEA
Thin developer docs for edge cases
FX rates not the most competitive
review.verdict: Practical choice for Singapore and SEA small businesses needing one gateway for cards, wallets, and POS.
review.best_for: SMBs in Singapore, Malaysia, and SEA selling online and in-store
review.not_for: Global SaaS or enterprises needing multi-region processing
